name: Reflex Care Training Pad 30pcs
description: With its ultra absorbent power and leak-proof design, it is perfect for toilet training. Thanks to the adhesive strips fixed to the floor, it does not slip. Its technology traps odors.     Puppy training pad training is great for puppy-owners without easy access to outdoors for their pets and those living in tall buildings. Make clean-up easy and are convenient for potty training. BENEFITS: 1 . Super-absorbent core. 2. Leak-proof with plastic lining to prevent damage to floors. 3. Quick-dry surface with built-in attractant 4. They’re comfortable for dogs. 5. They make clean-up easy. 6. They’re good options for dogs who can’t go outside for health reasons.
